name: Type I
description: Very fair skin, light eyes, freckles. Always burns, never tans.

name: Type II
description: Fair skin, light hair. Burns easily, tans minimally.

name: Type III
description: Medium skin tone. Sometimes burns, gradually tans.

name: Type IV
description: Olive or light brown skin. Rarely burns, tans easily.

name: Type V
description: Brown skin. Very rarely burns, tans profusely.

name: Type VI
description: Dark brown to black skin. Never burns.
burn_description: Extremely burn-resistant, but UV damage still accumulates
